description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
description.jp: 自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>と<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 使自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>和<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies. Increases damage dealt proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。このスキルは、自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. 이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害量越高。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nAt the end of the turn, grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\nターン終了時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n턴 종료 시 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>을 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n回合结束时,使自身<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>提升,持续\n<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
